content: Identity mapping failures: SCIM/Entra provisioning does not expand nested group memberships (must flatten); guest/B2B accounts need special identifier handling (user.mail); users appear with empty groups arrays causing silent downstream authorization failures; service principals cannot be synced by common SCIM connectors; Google Cloud Search/Agentspace require explicit external-identity mapping stores. Sources: Microsoft Learn, WorkOS, Google Cloud docs, Databricks docs.
